title: Main Branch Protection Contract
description: Defines the required status checks and branch protection settings for the main branch. Validated by scripts/check-required-contexts.mjs to prevent phantom-check drift.

requiredStatusChecks.description: The exact check context names that must pass before a PR can merge. Keep this list as short as possible — ideally one aggregator context (e.g. ci-required).

aggregatorJob.description: The workflow job whose result is the single required branch-protection context. Must match the first entry in requiredStatusChecks.

upstreamJobs.description: The workflow job names that the aggregatorJob depends on. scripts/check-required-contexts.mjs validates these names exist in the workflow files.

enforceAdmins.description: Whether branch protection rules apply to repository administrators.

requireLinearHistory.description: Require a linear commit history (no merge commits).

allowForcePushes.description: Allow force pushes to the protected branch.

allowDeletions.description: Allow the protected branch to be deleted.
